name: 照片
structure: 单张平面纸张，有正面和背面
shooting_angle: 单物体居中，三分之二或正面产品摄影角度，完整可见
readable_text_policy: 不可读图像块或儿童画轮廓，正面不生成清晰文字，背面为空白纸面
reference_prompt: A single 10cm x 15cm white photo paper print, flat planar structure with front and back sides; front side shows an indistinct, unreadable image or child-like drawing outline in blurred or abstract style without any legible text; back side is plain blank white paper; overall clean and undamaged condition, oriented front-facing to viewer as if held in hand or on desk center.。源记录硬约束：数量:1张；位置:首帧在持有者手中或桌面视觉中心；运动政策:只随持有者手部轻微移动，不新增副本，不做面向切换

source_contract.position: 首帧在持有者手中或桌面视觉中心
source_contract.motion_policy: 只随持有者手部轻微移动，不新增副本，不做面向切换
source_contract.quantity_policy: 只允许这一张 PHOTO_01，不得生成额外纸张副本
